recalls.Description: Lutron is recalling its power interfaces, model LU-PH3-B, designed for LED tape lights. These 96W hard-wired interfaces were sold individually and as part of Lumaris RGB+ tunable white LED tape light starter kits for RadioRA 3 systems (model RRL-MTK-RT-IN) and HomeWorks systems (model HWL-MTK-RT-IN). The recall is due to a potential shock hazard that can occur if the device fails during a significant power surge, such as a lightning strike.
recalls.Title: Lutron Recalls Power Interfaces for LED Tape Lights Due to Shock Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach Lutron at 800-239-0495 from 8 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday, via email at productrecall@lutron.com, or visit https://residential.lutron.com/us/en/safety/safety-recall for more details.

Products.Name: Lutron Power Interfaces for LED Tape Lights

Images.Caption: Close up of product label on recalled Lutron Power Interface
RadioRA 3 LED tape light starter kit package label lists the recalled power interface
HomeWorks LED tape light starter kit package label lists the recalled power interface

Retailers.Name: Available through dealers and distributors of audiovisual equipment and electrical supplies nationwide from September 2024 to April 2025, priced around $300 for the power interfaces and between $1,250 and $1,400 for the Lumaris LED tape light starter kits and HomeWorks systems.

Distributors.Name: Lutron Electronics Co. Inc., of Coopersburg, Pennsylvania

Hazards.Name: Shock hazard due to potential power interface failure during power surges

Remedies.Name: Stop using the recalled power interfaces and connected lighting; contact Lutron for a free replacement and installation

recalls.metaDescription: Lutron recalls power interfaces for LED tape lights due to shock risk. Stop using and contact Lutron for a free replacement.
